---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem with the skill workflow or documentation
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

Describe what went wrong.

## Affected Area

- [ ] Intake
- [ ] WordPress baseline
- [ ] Elementor page build
- [ ] Code Snippets
- [ ] WooCommerce product page
- [ ] Cart/checkout
- [ ] Product CSV import
- [ ] Rank Math SEO
- [ ] Article generation
- [ ] QA/launch gate
- [ ] Open-source docs

## Expected Behavior

What should the skill tell the AI agent to do?

## Evidence

Include file paths, screenshots, logs, or exact steps when possible. Do not include passwords, tokens, customer data, or private site exports.

## Safety Impact

- [ ] Could break checkout or orders
- [ ] Could expose data or secrets
- [ ] Could cause launch before QA
- [ ] Could create unclickable/frozen UI
- [ ] Could lose products/media
- [ ] No known safety impact
